title: Airtable request fails with status code 422
symptom: When trying to send user data to Airtable, the request fails with a 422 status code, indicating an issue with the request format.
applies_when: Using Airtable to store user data
not_this_if: The user_id field is correctly set as a text column in Airtable
root_cause: The 422 error indicates that Airtable cannot process the request due to a mismatch in expected data types. Specifically, if the user_id is sent as a number while Airtable expects it to be a text field, this error will occur.
fix_steps: Check the Airtable schema and ensure the user_id field is set to text.
If it is set to number, change it to text and try sending the data again.
agent_instruction: Ensure the user_id field in Airtable is a text column and resend the data.
